resources.string: Notifications from the ContextOS AI assistant, including task reminders and proactive suggestions.
Silent background sync notifications for calendar, email, and drive data.
Ongoing foreground service notification that keeps ContextOS active in the background.
ContextOS uses your location to surface context-aware suggestions and set location-based reminders.
ContextOS uses the microphone for voice input so you can dictate tasks and commands hands-free.
Allow notifications so ContextOS can alert you to important events and reminders.
ContextOS reads your calendar to help plan your day and avoid scheduling conflicts.
ContextOS reads SMS messages to give you a unified view of your conversations and follow-ups.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
